title: CP2 Protocol Applicability Matrix
cp2_scope: Internal staff process rehearsal with no affected-person participation, no participant evidence, and no live product effects.

protocols.reason: CP2 staff must voluntarily agree to the rehearsal and may stop without employment, service, or compensation penalty.
A staff rehearsal may still encounter distress, sensitive disclosure, or safeguarding concerns.
Restricted role, contact, access, incident, and rehearsal records require controlled handling.
Staff rights and stop routes must be usable through accessible language and communication channels.
Team hierarchy, friendship, compensation, or founder authority must not coerce participation.
CP2 contains no child, adolescent, family, client, or affected-person participation.
The operating context and professional-duty boundaries of the staff rehearsal must be qualified.
